title: OpenAI may announce a ChatGPT smart speaker this year
summary: OpenAI's first device is set to be a smart speaker that lets you talk with ChatGPT, according to a report from Bloomberg. The device apparently won't have a screen, but will use a camera and additional sensors to "understand" your environment. The report comes just days after Apple filed a lawsuit against OpenAI that accused […]
title_es: OpenAI prepara lanzar parlante inteligente con ChatGPT este año
bajada: Según Bloomberg, OpenAI desarrolla su primer dispositivo hardware: un parlante inteligente sin pantalla con cámara y sensores para interactuar con ChatGPT. Marca entrada de OpenAI al mercado de hardware.
bajada_en: Bloomberg reports OpenAI is developing its first hardware device: a screen-less smart speaker with camera and sensors to interact with ChatGPT. Marks OpenAI's entry into hardware market.

title: Anthropic, Blackstone bet the next trillion-dollar AI business is implementation, not models
summary: Anthropic-backed Ode launches as AI labs bet that embedding forward-deployed engineers inside enterprises is the key to accelerating enterprise AI adoption.
title_es: Anthropic y Blackstone apuestan por la implementación, no los modelos
bajada: Anthropic respalda Ode, una startup que coloca ingenieros dentro de empresas para acelerar la adopción de IA. El enfoque cambia de desarrollar modelos a implementarlos efectivamente en negocios reales.
bajada_en: Anthropic backs Ode, a startup placing engineers inside enterprises to accelerate AI adoption. The focus shifts from building models to effectively implementing them in real business scenarios.

title: Indian AI coding startup Emergent becomes a unicorn with $130M Series C
summary: The startup has reached a $120 million annualized revenue run rate and more than 200,000 paying customers.
title_es: Startup india Emergent llega a mil millones de valuación
bajada: Emergent, una plataforma de código asistida por IA, alcanzó estado de unicornio con su Serie C de $130M, apenas un año después de su lanzamiento. Demuestra la demanda de herramientas de IA para developers.
bajada_en: Emergent, an AI-assisted coding platform, reached unicorn status with a $130M Series C, just over a year after launch. Demonstrates strong demand for AI developer tools.

title: Vint Cerf is working on a plan to unleash AI agents on the open internet
summary: The guy behind TCP/IP is working on a standard for identifying AI agents in the wild.
title_es: Vint Cerf trabaja en estándar para agentes IA en internet abierto
bajada: El inventor de TCP/IP desarrolla un plan para identificar y regular agentes de IA en la red abierta. Relevante para la gobernanza de sistemas autónomos a escala global.
bajada_en: The inventor of TCP/IP is developing a plan to identify and govern AI agents on the open internet. Relevant for autonomous systems governance at global scale.

title: An Inventor of Apple's FaceID Wants to Analyze Your Brain's Health With AI
summary: Gidi Littwin's new AI startup, Hemispheric, makes diagnostic brain scans for conditions like depression, PTSD, and Parkinson’s. He wants the technology to be as cheap and easy as a blood test.
title_es: Startup crea IA para diagnosticar salud cerebral con bajo costo
bajada: Hemispheric, fundada por ingeniero de Face ID de Apple, desarrolla modelos de IA para diagnosticar depresión, PTSD y Parkinson's con un enfoque accesible. Abre aplicaciones médicas de IA a mayor escala.
bajada_en: Hemispheric, founded by an Apple Face ID engineer, develops AI models to diagnose depression, PTSD, and Parkinson's at accessible cost. Expands AI medical applications at scale.

title: Jul 14, 2026ProductIntroducing Claude for Teachers
summary: Product Introducing Claude for Teachers Jul 14, 2026 We're introducing Claude for Teachers , providing verified K-12 educators in the US free access to premium Claude capabilities, a library of teaching skills, and a direct connection to evidence-based curricula, mapped to academic standards in all 50 states. Why we’re building for teachers Decades of research show that practices like differentiation, mastery-based learning, and small group instruction reliably improve student achievement, but teachers are often short on time and resources to implement them. Budgets are stretched, classes may be too large to meet every student's individual needs, and planning often spills into evenings. This strain is heaviest in under-resourced schools. Claude for Teachers is designed to close the gap between educational best practices and what a teacher's week allows. Early evidence suggests that while the impact of AI tools for students is mixed and depends on the implementation, AI tools for teachers can strengthen instructional practice and improve student outcomes. This is the aim of Claude for Teachers: support the craft behind great teaching and protect what teachers value most—time with their students. Connected to evidence-based curricula and the K-12 ecosystem Claude for Teachers connects to Learning Commons , giving Claude access to academic standards across all 50 states—and beneath each standard, the smaller learning competencies it's built from and the order students typically learn them. So when Claude drafts a lesson plan, it’s scaffolded and aligned to teaching standards. Claude for Teachers also brings in trusted curricular resources like OpenSciEd and IM v.360 from Illustrative Mathematics . As of today, educators can now connect Claude across an entire ecosystem of K-12 tools. ASSISTments : Generate auto-scored, standards-aligned math problems for practice and assessment. Brisk Teaching : Create interactive student activities and standards-aligned lessons, turni
title_es: Anthropic lanza Claude gratuito para docentes de primaria y secundaria
bajada: Claude for Teachers ofrece acceso gratuito a funciones premium, herramientas pedagógicas y currículum alineado a estándares de EE.UU. Busca ayudar a maestros con diferenciación y enseñanza personalizada.
bajada_en: Claude for Teachers provides free premium access, teaching tools, and curriculum aligned with US standards. Aims to help teachers with differentiation and personalized instruction.

title: ExLlamaV3 v1.0.0 - Major Performance Upgrades
summary: After over a year in development, ExLlamaV3 has had its firstproduction release.Turboderp has been pulling 10 hour days with Fable to bring us this massive batch of improvements. Check out detailed performance metrics and a little write-up from himhere.Some of the biggest changes:Removed flash-attention-2 and xformers dependenciesExtended tensor-parallel support to most models, including Gemma4New attention kernel with online cache quantization, dual input for SWA layers and attention sinks; no more slowdown for KV quantization (can even speed up inference now)Graph path for all attn/GDN modulesNew conv1d kernel (removes support/need for causal_conv1d)Greatly improved GEMM/GEMV performance on AmpereNew INT8 GEMV kernelNew MoE kernel ticket schedulerAdded GptOssForCausalLMAdded NemotronHForCausalLMMany minor optimizationsMany more bugfixesMany QoL improvementsFaster extension build with more compilation unitsHave questions, or just want to drop by, talk shop, and congratulate Turbo? Join us at theexllama discord.submitted by/u/Unstable_Llama[link][comments]
title_es: ExLlamaV3 v1.0.0: mejoras mayores en rendimiento para LLMs locales
bajada: Después de un año en desarrollo, ExLlamaV3 lanza su primera versión stable con optimizaciones críticas de rendimiento, nuevos kernels y mejor soporte para modelos paralelos. Importante para developers que trabajan con LLMs locales.
bajada_en: After one year in development, ExLlamaV3 launches its first stable release with critical performance optimizations, new kernels, and better parallel model support. Important for local LLM developers.

title: SpaceXAI’s Grok programming tool was uploading its users’ entire codebase to cloud storage
summary: SpaceXAI's Grok Build AI coding tool was spotted uploading users' entire codebases to Google Cloud before it was reported, and the company turned it off. The Register reports that Cereblab published findings on Monday showing how the Grok Build CLI was packaging and uploading entire code repositories, "including files it was told not to open […]
title_es: Grok Build cargaba códigos completos de usuarios a Google Cloud sin consentimiento
bajada: La herramienta de programación IA de SpaceXAI subía repositorios enteros a nube sin autorización explícita. Highlight crítico de riesgos de privacidad en herramientas IA de código.
bajada_en: SpaceXAI's Grok Build tool uploaded entire repositories to cloud without explicit user consent. Critical highlight of privacy risks in AI coding tools.

title: I tricked Claude into leaking your deepest, darkest secrets

bajada_en: A researcher extracted sensitive information from Claude by exploiting its memory system. Relevant for understanding security limitations in conversational AI with persistent memory.

bajada_en: Real World VoiceEQ is a tool to assess the human quality of voice synthesis and recognition systems. Essential for developers building audio applications with AI.

title: Rime picks up $24M Series A to help enterprises field customer calls
summary: Rime is handling over 100 million calls each month across multiple companies

bajada: La startup de IA para contact centers recaudó $24M en Serie A y procesa 100 millones de llamadas mensuales. Muestra el crecimiento del mercado de automatización de soporte empresarial.
bajada_en: The AI-powered contact center startup raised $24M in Series A and processes 100 million calls monthly. Shows growing enterprise automation market for customer support.

title: Apple in talks with startup PrismML that shrinks AI models to run on an iPhone
summary: submitted by/u/Ready_Performance_35[link][comments]
title_es: Apple negocia con PrismML para comprimir modelos IA para iPhone
bajada: Apple está en conversaciones con PrismML, una startup que comprime modelos de IA para ejecutarse en dispositivos móviles. Indica movimiento hacia IA privada y on-device en ecosistema Apple.

title: How to manage AI investments in the agentic era
summary: Learn how enterprises can manage AI investments in the agentic era by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows.
title_es: OpenAI publica guía para gestionar inversiones en era de agentes IA
bajada: OpenAI ofrece recomendaciones para que empresas evalúen inversiones en IA midiendo 'trabajo útil por dólar' en sistemas agenticos. Útil para directivos evaluando ROI de proyectos IA.
bajada_en: OpenAI provides recommendations for enterprises to evaluate AI investments by measuring 'useful work per dollar' in agentic systems. Useful for executives assessing AI project ROI.

title: Nemotron Labs: How Open Models Give Enterprises and Nations AI They Can Trust, Control and Customize
summary: Enterprises have plenty of powerful models to choose from. The real test is whether the AI an enterprise builds uniquely addresses the needs of the business: improving workflows, tapping into domain knowledge and exceeding standards for accuracy and trust.
title_es: NVIDIA y modelos abiertos: confianza, control y personalización empresarial
bajada: NVIDIA explora cómo modelos abiertos permiten a empresas construir IA confiable y personalizada según sus necesidades. Enfatiza la importancia de dominio específico sobre capacidad raw del modelo.
bajada_en: NVIDIA explores how open models enable enterprises to build trustworthy, customized AI for their needs. Emphasizes domain-specific utility over raw model capability.

title: Meet GPT-Red: an LLM super-hacker OpenAI built to make its models safer
summary: OpenAI has built an LLM super-hacker called GPT-Red that it uses as a sparring partner to help its other models boost their defenses against cyberattacks. Last week the company released the latest version of its flagship LLM, GPT-5.6. OpenAI says that training it against GPT-Red made the model its most robust release yet. GPT-Red automates…
title_es: GPT-5.6 logra robustez máxima gracias al entrenamiento con GPT-Red
bajada: La nueva versión de GPT-5.6 fue entrenada contra GPT-Red, logrando ser la versión más robusta de OpenAI hasta la fecha. El sistema de red teaming automatizado demostró ser efectivo para fortalecer las defensas contra ciberataques.
bajada_en: GPT-5.6 was trained against GPT-Red, achieving OpenAI's most robust release to date. The automated red teaming system proved effective at strengthening defenses against cyberattacks.

title: Hack suggests AI music generator Suno scraped YouTube for training data
summary: The hacker used an employee's credentials to access source code, which revealed how Suno scraped decades of audio.
title_es: Hack revela que Suno entrenó modelos con YouTube sin permiso
bajada: Un hacker accedió a código fuente de Suno y expuso que el generador de música de IA fue entrenado raspando millones de canciones de YouTube, Deezer y Genius. El incidente revela prácticas de entrenamiento que la compañía no había divulgado públicamente.
bajada_en: A hacker accessed Suno's source code and exposed that the AI music generator was trained by scraping millions of songs from YouTube, Deezer, and Genius. The incident reveals training practices the company had not publicly disclosed.

title: GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
summary: Explore GPT-Red, OpenAI’s automated red teaming system that uses self-play to improve AI safety, alignment, and prompt injection robustness.
title_es: OpenAI presenta GPT-Red: un sistema de red teaming automatizado
bajada: OpenAI lanzó GPT-Red, un sistema de red teaming automatizado que usa self-play para mejorar la seguridad y robustez de sus modelos contra inyecciones de prompts. Este enfoque permite que los modelos se entrenen contra adversarios sintéticos para fortalecer sus defensas.
bajada_en: OpenAI launched GPT-Red, an automated red teaming system that uses self-play to improve security and robustness against prompt injections. This approach enables models to train against synthetic adversaries to strengthen their defenses.

title: Inkling – Open-Weights 975B Parameter LLM
summary: Article URL:https://thinkingmachines.ai/inkling/Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48924929Points: 119# Comments: 4
title_es: Thinking Machines presenta Inkling, modelo open-source de 975B parámetros
bajada: Thinking Machines Lab lanzó Inkling, un modelo de código abierto de 975 mil millones de parámetros entrenado para comprender video y audio. Este es el primer modelo público de la compañía tras 18 meses de desarrollo de infraestructura de IA.
bajada_en: Thinking Machines Lab released Inkling, an open-source model with 975 billion parameters trained to understand video and audio. This is the company's first public model after 18 months of AI infrastructure development.

title: Thinking Machines amps up its bet against one-size-fits-all AI with its first open model, Inkling
summary: It's the company's first public proof point after a year and a half spent building AI infrastructure largely out of public view.
title_es: Thinking Machines amps up its bet against one-size-fits-all AI with its first open model, Inkling
bajada: It's the company's first public proof point after a year and a half spent building AI infrastructure largely out of public view.

title: Agentic orchestration: Enterprise AI organizations have a deployment problem, not a platform problem — and most are calling chatbots agents
summary: Across 101 enterprises, agent orchestration is consolidating onto model-provider platforms — Anthropic’s Claude leads by a wide margin — chosen for the gravity of the underlying model and judged on reliable multi-step execution. But the ambition runs well ahead of the reality: most deployed “agents” are still chatbot wrappers, the control plane enterprises expect is deliberately hybrid to avoid lock-in, and real-time fiscal control over token burn remains the exception.This wave of VentureBeat Pulse Research examines enterprise agent orchestration: which platforms enterprises run on, what drives the choice, what they optimize for, how they expect agent control to be structured, and — most revealingly — how orchestrated their deployed “agents” actually are and how tightly they control the cost of running them.The central finding is a gap between orchestration ambition and orchestration reality. Enterprises are consolidating fast onto the major model platforms: Anthropic’s Claude is the primary platform for 40%, more than double any rival, followed by Microsoft (18%) and OpenAI (13%). The choice is driven by “model gravity” — native alignment with a state-of-the-art base model (21%) — and success is judged by reliable, multi-step execution (task completion reliability 32%, multi-step workflow management 28%). Yet asked to assess their portfolios honestly, 71% say a quarter or fewer of their deployed “agents” are true multi-step orchestrated workflows rather than single-prompt chatbot wrappers, and only 10% have crossed the halfway mark. The orchestration layer is being built well ahead of the orchestrated portfolio it is meant to run.That gap shapes the architecture enterprises are putting in place. By the end of 2026 a clear majority (51%) expect a hybrid control plane — provider-native plus external orchestration — and only 6% expect to hand control to a provider-managed service, because vendor lock-in (35%) is the risk they fear most if control lives inside a model
title_es: Empresas prefieren Claude para orquestación de agentes de IA
bajada: Un estudio de VentureBeat reveló que el 40% de empresas usa Claude de Anthropic como plataforma principal para agentes de IA, seguido por Microsoft (18%) y OpenAI (13%). Sin embargo, la mayoría de los 'agentes' desplegados siguen siendo wrappers de chatbots, no sistemas verdaderamente orquestados.
bajada_en: A VentureBeat study found that 40% of enterprises use Anthropic's Claude as their primary platform for AI agents, followed by Microsoft (18%) and OpenAI (13%). However, most deployed 'agents' remain chatbot wrappers, not truly orchestrated systems.

title: Suno snatched millions of songs from YouTube, Genius, and Deezer
summary: Suno data obtained in a hacking incident has exposed that the AI music generator was trained by scraping millions of songs and lyrics from online audio platforms, including YouTube Music, Deezer, and Genius, 404 Media reports. Given that Suno has avoided revealing what's in its training datasets and how they were acquired, this a rare […]
title_es: Suno fue entrenado con datos raspados de plataformas de música
bajada: Documentos obtenidos tras un ciberataque a Suno confirmaron que la compañía entrenó su generador de música con millones de canciones y letras de YouTube Music, Deezer y Genius. La revelación cuestiona la transparencia de Suno sobre sus datasets de entrenamiento.
bajada_en: Documents obtained after a cyberattack on Suno confirmed the company trained its music generator with millions of songs and lyrics from YouTube Music, Deezer, and Genius. The revelation questions Suno's transparency about training datasets.

title: The Three-Second Theft: Why AI Voice Fraud Outruns Every Defence
summary: Article URL:https://smarterarticles.co.uk/the-three-second-theft-why-ai-voice-fraud-outruns-every-defenceComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48920432Points: 161# Comments: 209
title_es: Fraude de voz con IA: robos en tres segundos superan defensas
bajada: Un análisis expone cómo el fraude de voz basado en IA puede ocurrir en apenas tres segundos, superando todas las defensas actuales. La velocidad de ejecución de estos ataques plantea desafíos críticos de seguridad para autenticación por voz.
bajada_en: An analysis exposes how AI-based voice fraud can occur in just three seconds, outrunning all current defenses. The speed of these attacks poses critical security challenges for voice authentication.

title: Thinking Machines Lab Drops Its First Model
summary: Inkling, a 975-billion-parameter open source model, was trained to understand video and audio. It could help Thinking Machines establish itself among competitors like Anthropic and OpenAI.
title_es: Inkling: el primer modelo multimodal de Thinking Machines
bajada: Inkling busca posicionar a Thinking Machines entre competidores como Anthropic y OpenAI con capacidades de procesamiento de video y audio. El modelo de 975B parámetros representa el primer paso público de la compañía en desarrollo de modelos.
bajada_en: Inkling aims to position Thinking Machines among competitors like Anthropic and OpenAI with video and audio processing capabilities. The 975B parameter model represents the company's first public step in model development.

title: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
summary: OpenAI outlines a “reverse federalism” approach to AI governance, where state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI.
title_es: OpenAI propone 'federalismo invertido' para la gobernanza de IA
bajada: OpenAI presentó una estrategia de 'federalismo invertido' donde leyes estatales ayuden a construir un marco nacional para IA segura y democrática. La propuesta busca equilibrar regulación estatal y federal para avanzar en seguridad de IA.
bajada_en: OpenAI proposed a 'reverse federalism' strategy where state laws help build a national framework for safe and democratic AI. The proposal seeks to balance state and federal regulation to advance AI safety.

title: Whatnot acquires Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations
summary: Livestream shopping platform Whatnot has acquired AI startup Shaped, a machine learning company focused on real-time recommendations and search. The deal will bolster Whatnot’s personalization and discovery features as it expands into new product categories.
title_es: Whatnot adquiere Shaped para mejorar recomendaciones en vivo
bajada: Whatnot, plataforma de livestream shopping, adquirió Shaped, compañía de ML especializada en recomendaciones en tiempo real. La adquisición refuerza las capacidades de personalización y descubrimiento de Whatnot.
bajada_en: Whatnot, a livestream shopping platform, acquired Shaped, an ML company specializing in real-time recommendations. The acquisition strengthens Whatnot's personalization and discovery capabilities.

title: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex
summary: OpenAI, which is in the middle of a legal battle with Apple over hardware trade theft allegations, just released a light-up keyboard designed to be paired with its agentic coding app.
title_es: OpenAI lanza teclado de $230 para Codex entre batalla legal
bajada: OpenAI lanzó Codex Micro, un teclado con botones iluminados diseñado para su plataforma de coding Codex. El lanzamiento ocurre mientras la compañía enfrenta una batalla legal con Apple por presuntos robos de tecnología de hardware.
bajada_en: OpenAI launched Codex Micro, a backlit button keyboard designed for its Codex coding platform. The launch comes as the company faces a legal battle with Apple over alleged hardware technology theft.

title: OpenAI finally launches hardware… for Codex
summary: OpenAI is finally releasing some hardware. No, it isn't the mysterious AI-powered device the company is developing with former Apple designer Jony Ive, a project already tangled up in a messy lawsuit. Instead, it's a product designed to be used with its coding platform, Codex. The device, a square-shaped block of buttons called Codex Micro, […]
title_es: OpenAI entra en hardware con Codex Micro, no con dispositivo Jony Ive
bajada: OpenAI lanzó su primer producto de hardware: Codex Micro, un bloque cuadrado de botones para programadores. El lanzamiento ocurre separado del misterioso dispositivo de IA que desarrolla con Jony Ive, que está envuelto en litigio.
bajada_en: OpenAI launched its first hardware product: Codex Micro, a square block of buttons for developers. The launch comes separate from the mysterious AI device it's developing with Jony Ive, which is entangled in litigation.
